taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Carbohydrate Chemistry and Metabolism (BI3.1-6).

words.clue: Universal 10-step glucose breakdown pathway occurring in the cytoplasm
Metabolic cycle in the mitochondrial matrix that oxidises acetyl-CoA
Pathway of glucose synthesis from non-carbohydrate precursors
Storage polysaccharide in liver and muscle composed of glucose units
Hexose monophosphate shunt product needed for nucleotide synthesis
Hormone secreted by pancreatic beta cells that lowers blood glucose
Two-carbon unit that enters the TCA cycle from pyruvate
Condition with fasting blood glucose above 126 mg/dL

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the material and try again.
Good effort! Review the areas you missed.
